allow: PowerShell(python -X utf8 "c:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\materGO\\translate\\_fix_glossary.py" 2>&1; python -X utf8 -c "import csv; rows=list\(csv.DictReader\(open\(r'c:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\materGO\\translate\\lexar-glossary-categorized-v2.csv','r',encoding='utf-8-sig'\)\)\); [print\(r['source'],'|',r['category'],'| fr=',r.get\('fr',''\)[:30],'| vi=',r.get\('vi',''\)[:30],'| it=',r.get\('it',''\)[:30]\) for r in rows if r['source'] in ['GOLD','DIAMOND','SILVER PLUS','SILVER PRO','BLUE PLUS','ARMOR GOLD','ARMOR SILVER PRO']]")

PowerShell(python -X utf8 -c "import csv; r=list\(csv.DictReader\(open\(r'c:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\materGO\\translate\\lexar-glossary-categorized-v2.csv','r',encoding='utf-8-sig'\)\)\); from collections import Counter; cats=Counter\(x['category'] for x in r\); print\('=== Final Glossary Summary ==='\); print\(f'Total terms: {len\(r\)}'\); print\(f'Categories: {len\(cats\)}'\); print\(\); [print\(f'  {c}: {n}'\) for c,n in sorted\(cats.items\(\)\)]; print\(\); print\('=== Language Coverage ==='\); h=[k for k in r[0].keys\(\) if k not in\('category','source'\)]; [print\(f'  {c}: {sum\(1 for x in r if x.get\(c,\\"\\"\).strip\(\)\)}/{len\(r\)}'\) for c in h]")
